new_terms.context: A specific Microsoft product name, part of the seat-based software model being discussed.
A specific CRM product used as an example of a form and workflow wrapper at risk from AI agents.
A data visualization software product mentioned as an outdated concept in the age of AI.
A collaborative design tool for creating wireframes, mentioned as being at risk.
Abbreviation for User Experience. The text states that 'Every bit of UX or preference is at risk.'
A descriptive phrase for software like Salesforce that provides a structured interface over a database.
Refers to the process of AI automatically generating the basic structure (scaffolding) for a form or workflow.
